summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shadow Cakes Components feature rebuild. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features tested successfully including Components list page, Component detail page, Add Component/Ingredient/Packaging/Variant dialogs, Recipe Components tab, Import page Components tab, and separate Prep Time/Utility Time fields.
passed_tests: Components list page (/components) loads and shows component cards with name, category, yield, variant tags
Click on component card navigates to /components/:componentId detail page
Component detail page shows variant selector, prep time, utility time, batch yield — all editable
Add Ingredient dialog works on component detail page
Add Packaging dialog works on component detail page
Add Variant dialog works on component detail page
Cost breakdown panel shows ingredient costs, labour, utilities, total cost, and cost per gram
Back button on component detail navigates to /components list
Create new component via Add Component button on list page
Delete component via dropdown menu on list page (Edit and Delete options present)
CSV import for components using recipe_name column works: POST /api/import/components
Recipe detail page can add components via Components tab
Recipe detail page cost breakdown includes component costs (with gram costing option)
Import page Components tab shows correct columns (recipe_name, variant_name, ingredient_name, quantity, unit, prep_time_minutes, utility_time_minutes, category, notes, batch_yield_grams)
Recipes page still works correctly (no regression)
Separate Prep Time and Utility Time on recipe detail page (240 min prep, 20 min utility shown separately)
Component CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete) all working
Component cost calculation includes ingredient costs, labour cost, utility cost, and cost per gram
test_credentials: No authentication required - single-user personal tool
seed_data_creation: Test components created and cleaned up: TEST_Vanilla Buttercream, TEST_Playwright_Ganache
context_for_next_testing_agent: Components feature fully rebuilt and tested. Components now have the exact same structure as recipes — variants with ingredients, packaging, prep_time_minutes, utility_time_minutes. Key difference is components also have batch_yield_grams for gram costing. Component detail page does NOT have selling price or Record a Sale button (components are sub-recipes, not sold directly). Recipe detail page has Components tab for adding components with gram costing option. Import page Components tab uses recipe_name column (same as recipes import format).
